description: Investigate error rate spike and latency increase — check recent deploys, logs, and metrics
Acknowledge PagerDuty alert and open incident channel — correlate with v2.14.0 deploy
Examine commit abc123f for breaking changes — connection pool configuration changed
Initiate rollback of payment-service from v2.14.0 to v2.13.2 to stop the bleeding
Post status update: root cause identified as connection pool misconfiguration in v2.14.0, rollback in progress
Confirm rollback successful, error rates returning to normal, monitoring recovery
Set up deployment canary alert: error rate threshold at 2% for 5 minutes post-deploy before full rollout
Create fix PR: restore connection pool size to 100 in config, add integration test for pool exhaustion under load
